title: Orbital Strike Cannon Textures
description: Gives different textures to orbital strike cannons from mods.
body:
Uses components from orbital strike cannon mods to add two unique textures, one for stab shots, and one for nuke shots.

Compatible Mods
- [Orbital+](https://modrinth.com/project/Q97V4fVl)*
- [Orbital Strike Cannon | DataPack | Mod | Plugin](https://modrinth.com/project/Y1ZEvtor)
- [Orbital Strike Cannon](https://modrinth.com/project/upn22sNG)**
- [Nuclear Rods](https://modrinth.com/project/Pq1PwwmG)
  
If the mod you are using is not on this list or you are using an actual cannon, use [this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/project/eNeaaazj) instead, which adds these textures based on item name.

*There are some issues with the resource pack when using this mod, such as casting the fishing rod using the normal texture

**This mod adds an entirely new item that looks identical to the fishing rod, so instead of detecting a component, I simply redirected the texture from the default fishing rod texture to the custom one.
